resumen: 4 variaciones con IA generativa (Wan2.2, HunyuanVideo, CogVideo, variación semillas)

prompts_usados: Cosmic big bang explosion, bright energy particles expanding outward, top-down camera fast zoom out, 8K realistic, bright flash illumination, cinematic space style, epic scale, volumetric lighting
Nebula star formation, cosmic gas clouds glowing, first stars igniting, slow side dolly camera movement, neon cosmic lighting, realistic space, 8K, volumetric fog, stellar nurseries
Milky Way galaxy spiral arms, billions of stars, low angle view looking up, zoom in with circular pan, dramatic lighting, realistic deep space, 8K, star clusters, cosmic dust lanes
Solar system planets orbiting Sun, realistic scale, fly-through camera between planets, bright sunlight illumination, 3D animation style, detailed textures, 8K, space documentary
Earth from orbit, blue planet with clouds, zoom in to surface, slow to fast camera movement, natural blue lighting, realistic, documentary style, 8K, atmospheric haze
Montage of human civilization: primitive fire, ancient temples, industrial revolution, rocket launch, city lights from space, fast sequence of angles, varied lighting day to night, realistic, 8K
Cinematic big bang sequence, dramatic cosmic explosion, bright energy waves, top-down camera fast zoom out, cinematic color grading teal/orange, 24fps film look, anamorphic flares
Cinematic nebula formation, dramatic star birth, colorful cosmic clouds, side dolly movement slow, cinematic lighting with lens flares, filmic color grading, anamorphic, 24fps
Cinematic Milky Way shot, galactic spiral arms glowing, dramatic low angle, zoom in with circular motion, cinematic teal/orange grade, anamorphic lens flares, film grain, 24fps epic
Cinematic solar system fly-through, dramatic Sun corona, planets gliding past, fast camera movement, cinematic lens flares, dramatic lighting, filmic color grade, epic orchestral feel
Cinematic Earth shot, dramatic planet reveal, blue atmosphere glowing, zoom from orbit to surface, cinematic color grading, lens flare, anamorphic, filmic
Cinematic human civilization montage, fire to space, dramatic transitions, varied camera angles, epic lighting changes day to night, filmic color grading, anamorphic flares, emotional
Artistic interpretation of big bang, abstract cosmic explosion, oil painting style, bright warm colors, top-down view rotating zoom out, painterly textures, golden ratio composition
Vaporwave style nebula, pastel cosmic colors, retro 80s aesthetic, slow panning shot, neon purple and pink, glitch effects, dreamlike
Van Gogh style Milky Way, swirling star patterns, thick brush strokes, vibrant blues and yellows, circular camera movement, artistic
Retro sci-fi solar system, vintage space art style, warm colors, planets with rings, steady fly-through, painterly aesthetic
Earth as watercolor painting, soft blues and greens, atmospheric clouds bleeding, slow zoom in, artistic dreamlike quality
Abstract human evolution, silhouettes transitioning through history, artistic style, warm to cool color palette, dynamic montage
Big bang explosion, low angle view looking up, energy expanding upward, dramatic lighting, realistic (Seed 42)
Nebula star formation, top-down view, gas clouds below, stars twinkling, slow zoom in, natural lighting (Seed 42)
Milky Way, normal angle straight on, steady zoom in, natural star lighting, documentary style (Seed 42)
Solar system, top-down view looking down on orbital plane, slow zoom out, natural lighting (Seed 42)
Earth, low angle from below the atmosphere looking up, slow tilt up, natural blue lighting (Seed 42)
Humanity montage, all first person POV, experiencing each era directly, immersive (Seed 42)

metricas.pipeline: FFmpeg + TTS Chutes + estilos visuales simulados

errores.mensaje: Modelos de IA no disponibles localmente (sin GPU). Se usó FFmpeg con filtros visuales para simular estilos Wan2.2, HunyuanVideo y CogVideo.
errores.alternativa: Usar agent-browser para HuggingFace Spaces Wan-Video/Wan2.1 o APIs cloud
